selection_rule: split each calendar month into equal time strata, then take the first chronological one-second block in every stratum with finite power at every step and the prespecified minimum positive-power share
separation: months 2025-06 through 2026-06 are not concatenated with the original May 2025 seven-day modelling chain; every block resets health/control state
parameter_use_boundary: the archive previously supported the scalar 40 kW operating reference, but these blocks did not tune controller weights, assignments or health parameters
